schema.ion.id › core › rating › v1

core/rating/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/rating/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

IONRatingAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/rating/v1#IONRatingAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
ratingCategory—PROVIDER: overall seller/provider rating. ITEM: specific product quality rating. FULFILLMENT: delivery experience rating
ratingValue—Rating on a 1-5 scale. Can be decimal to one place e.g. 4.5. BPP stores and aggregates ratings.
feedbackText—Optional free-text feedback accompanying the rating.
feedbackUrl—URL returned by BPP in on_rate for consumer to provide extended feedback via seller's own feedback form.
ratingWindowDays—Number of days after DELIVERED state during which rating can be submitted. Declared by BPP in on_confirm.
contractId—Contract this rating applies to.
ratedEntityId—ID of the entity being rated. For PROVIDER: provider ID. For ITEM: resource ID. For AGENT: agent identifier.
ratingSubCategory—Category-specific rating dimension. Enables granular seller insights and more informative reviews. Examples by category:
ratingImages—Photo URLs attached to the review. Subject to BAP/BPP moderation. Photo reviews drive significant conversion on all majo
ratingVideos—Video reviews for product feedback. Moderated.
verifiedPurchase—Whether this rating is from a verified purchase on ION. True by default — all ION ratings are verified purchases by desi
helpfulCount—Number of users who marked this review as helpful
sellerResponse—Seller's public response to the review

Pack README

ion-core/rating/v1

Post-transaction rating 1-5. Categories: PROVIDER, ITEM, FULFILLMENT, AGENT. APIs: rate/on_rate.

Attaches to

`beckn:Rate`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/rating/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
